message:
✨ Show all match reason badges per failover row, fix EAC-3 audio (#75)

- Changed matchReason from single String to Set<String> matchReasons
- Each failover row now shows all applicable badges (EPG, name, call sign, etc.)
- Accumulate match reasons per channel instead of first-match-wins
- Force FFmpeg software decoders for AC-3/EAC-3 with strict=-2
- Increase demuxer probe size for non-standard MPEG-TS codec tags
- Add currentUrlStream for live failover tracking
- Add audio track debug logging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
